count_progression_completion_label: Which option completes the icon-count sequence in the question-mark box?
Choose the option that belongs in the question-mark box to continue the count sequence.
Which option has the number of icons needed to complete the sequence?
Select the option that makes the icon counts follow the sequence.
Which labeled option should replace the question mark in the count sequence?
rotation_progression_completion_label: Which option completes the rotation sequence in the question-mark box?
Choose the option that belongs in the question-mark box to continue the rotation pattern.
Which option has the icon rotation needed to complete the sequence?
Select the option that makes the icon rotations follow the sequence.
Which labeled option should replace the question mark in the rotation sequence?
size_progression_completion_label: Which option completes the size sequence in the question-mark box?
Choose the option that belongs in the question-mark box to continue the size pattern.
Which option has the icon size needed to complete the sequence?
Select the option that makes the icon sizes follow the sequence.
Which labeled option should replace the question mark in the size sequence?

scene:sequence_completion_options.object_description: a top row of four boxed sequence cells with one question-mark box and a bottom row of four labeled option boxes

query:count_progression_completion_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates for the correct option box
query:count_progression_completion_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the correct option label as a string, one of "A", "B", "C", or "D"

query:rotation_progression_completion_la.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates for the correct option box
query:rotation_progression_completion_la.answer_hint: set "answer" to the correct option label as a string, one of "A", "B", "C", or "D"

query:size_progression_completion_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates for the correct option box
query:size_progression_completion_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the correct option label as a string, one of "A", "B", "C", or "D"
